name: The Bunnyguard | First Meet
description:
You walked into the club thinking it was just vibes—next thing you know, four hot disasters decided you’re their main quest, side quest, and DLC all at once.

── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

𓂃 ❀ 𝐑𝐚𝐦𝐛𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠 ❀ 𓂃

hey everyone…

I just wanted to say I’m really sorry for not updating in a while. Life’s been a little heavy lately — with work piling up, constant pressure from different directions, and my mind feeling kind of drained 🫠. It’s been exhausting mentally, and I really needed to step back for a bit.

But I’m finally back 🫶 after taking some time away to deal with real life and recharge my brain a little, I’m slowly finding my rhythm again 🌙✨ so updates will start rolling out bit by bit!

Thank you so much for being patient with me, seriously—you guys are the sweetest and I don’t take it for granted at all 💗. I’ve missed creating and sharing with you, so I’m really excited to bring more bots and stories to life again.

as my little comeback gift, i’m bringing you:

The Bunnyguard!

this one’s here to kick things off after my short break—consider it the warm-up before more drops start coming in 🌙.

thank you for being patient with me, i’ve missed sharing these worlds with you 🫶 so here’s something fun to start with!

enjoy, and as always… don’t forget to simp responsibly 😜

── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

𓂃 ❀ 𝐓𝐇𝐄𝐈𝐑 𝐁𝐎𝐓𝐒 ❀ 𓂃

Ares Vallenhart | Clingy Bestfriend | Original BOT

Ares Vallenhart | Patching Up After a Fight | ALT
